heading: Lands excepted from leasing provisions
label: 396f Lands excepted from leasing provisions
text: Sections 396a, 396b, 396c, and 396d of this title shall not apply to the Crow Reservation in Montana, the ceded lands of the Shoshone Reservation in Wyoming, the Osage Reservation in Oklahoma, nor to the coal and asphalt lands of the Choctaw and Chickasaw Tribes in Oklahoma.
notes: Amendments1955—Act , struck out “the Papago Indian Reservation in Arizona,” after “shall not apply to”.May 27, 1955
Repeal of Inconsistent ActsFor repeal of inconsistent acts, see section 7 of act , set out as a note under .May 11, 1938section 396a of this title
Papago Indian ReservationSection 1 of act , authorized the leasing of minerals for mining purposes. See note under .May 27, 1955section 5103 of this title
